artifacts.title: World receipt from 2025-10-05
artifacts.excerpt:
US employer based private health insurance exists because of Uncle Sam’s liberal good intentions

The IRS decided to exempt health insurance benefits from being taxed in 1943 after wage controls were imposed to prevent inflation from the war effort

The system locked into a tight relationship between employers, employees, and state/federal government because of this historical event, it evolved from then on unabated

The IRS’s decision, then under FDR, represents great liberal governance at the height of American industrial society— it was gently putting workers on health insurance and forcing employers to support it at a time when the nation was under pressure from the war

This made sense at a time when you’d work for the same company your whole life— in the atomized, polarized, lonely, socially networked America of 2025, it no longer makes sense

Health insurance costs are the hidden

artifacts.title: World receipt from 2025-10-07
artifacts.excerpt:
This is an incredible insight. I fully agree. Reading is passive and detached from the world.

On a very related note, tech became a lot less distracting once I stopped resisting how I used it.

I realized all my internal discourse about how tech is bad for me was actually just because I felt bad about not having full control over my attention. But letting your attention wander where it wants to is how you create things. It’s how I found your account.

artifacts.title: Insurance receipt from 2025-10-05
artifacts.excerpt:
Health insurance premiums are going up next year to unusual levels— this is a signal showing immense vulnerability at the intersection of multiple overbearing and inefficient systems in America

I wish there was an open source federated social media for real communities to create their own health insurance policy with secure data sharing with other community instances in a nested form

People would be assisted in making collective democratic decisions on their insurance policies by LLMs trained on this nested data and owned by them. They could adjust for individual cases on a spontaneous basis with collective agreement and they would be able to set the constitution for how to make these decisions

For data sharing between instances, the creators would kick off initial conditions for these constitutions based on best practices from political theory
